steps.eval: new Promise((resolve, reject) => { window.astrolabe.setAlidade(45); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => { try { const square = document.querySelector('[data-testid=shadow-square]'); if (!square) throw new Error('shadow-square journey element missing'); const x = Number(square.getAttribute('x')); const y = Number(square.getAttribute('y')) + Number(square.getAttribute('height')); if (Math.abs(x + y) > 1e-9) throw new Error(`45-degree alidade misses shadow-square corner (${x}, ${y})`); if (window.astrolabe.getState().alidadeRotation !== 45) throw new Error('alidade state did not rotate to 45 degrees'); resolve(true); } catch (error) { reject(error); } })); })

(() => { const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search); if (params.get('face') !== 'back' || params.get('alidade') !== '45' || params.get('hide') !== 'shadowSquare') throw new Error(`URL did not capture state: ${location.search}`); location.reload(); return true; })()

(() => { const state = window.astrolabe.getState(); if (state.face !== 'back' || state.alidadeRotation !== 45 || state.visibility.shadowSquare !== false) throw new Error('URL state was not restored after refresh'); })()
(() => { const e = document.querySelector('[data-testid=city-select]'); e.value = 'Cairo'; e.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); })()
